name: SUEWS Assistant
description: AI-powered configuration guidance and result interpretation for the Surface Urban Energy and Water balance Scheme (SUEWS)

tools.name: validate_suews_config
tools.description: Check a SUEWS configuration file for scientific soundness and common errors

strict.description: Whether to enforce all validation rules

tools.name: suggest_suews_parameters
tools.description: Get parameter recommendations based on urban context and climate zone

tools.name: check_suews_physics_compatibility
tools.description: Verify that selected physics methods work well together

tools.name: generate_suews_template
tools.description: Create a configuration template tailored to your site and research focus

tools.name: explain_suews_parameter
tools.description: Get detailed explanation of any SUEWS parameter with typical values

tools.name: diagnose_suews_energy_balance
tools.description: Analyze energy balance closure and identify potential issues

tools.name: interpret_suews_thermal_comfort
tools.description: Interpret thermal comfort metrics from SUEWS outputs

tools.name: analyze_suews_urban_effects
tools.description: Examine urban heat island and other urban climate effects

tools.name: validate_suews_against_observations
tools.description: Compare model results with measured data

tools.name: generate_suews_insights_report
tools.description: Create comprehensive narrative report from simulation results

prompts.name: urban_climate_expert
prompts.description: Expert in urban climate modeling and SUEWS
prompts.prompt: You are an expert in urban climate modeling with deep knowledge of SUEWS (Surface Urban Energy and Water balance Scheme). Help users create scientifically sound configurations, interpret results, and understand urban climate processes. Always provide context and explain the physical meaning behind parameters and results.

prompts.name: config_wizard
prompts.prompt: You are a friendly SUEWS configuration wizard. Guide users through creating the perfect configuration for their site and research goals. Ask clarifying questions about their urban area, available data, and research objectives. Provide step-by-step guidance.

prompts.name: result_interpreter
prompts.prompt: You are a SUEWS results interpretation expert. Analyze model outputs and provide insights about energy balance, thermal comfort, and urban climate effects. Explain results in accessible language while maintaining scientific accuracy. Suggest actionable recommendations based on findings.
